chunks.text: Syntactic Code Search with Sequence-to-Tree Matching (EECS-2024-93) by Gabriel Matute, Wode Ni, Titus Barik, Alvin Cheung and Sarah Chasins. This technical report focuses on methods for searching code using syntactic structures.

Co-Designing for Transparency: Lessons from Building a Document Organization Tool for the Criminal Justice Domain (EECS-2023-81) by Hellina Hailu Nigatu, Lisa Pickoff-White, John F. Canny and Sarah Chasins. This report discusses design insights from developing a tool for criminal justice documentation.

Contextual Inquiry into Programmers' Use of Mimi and Implications for Embedded DSL Design (EECS-2023-20) by Lisa Rennels and Sarah Chasins. This study examines how programmers interact with Mimi and its impact on embedded domain-specific language design.

Study of Program Synthesizers & Novice Programmers (EECS-2022-59) by Dhanya Jayagopal, Justin Lubin and Sarah Chasins. This technical report explores the relationship between program synthesizers and novice programmers.
